title: Ripples of the Past: Killer Queen Addon
description: A mod that adds Killer Queen to Ripples of the Past mod
body:
![Killer Queen Addon banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c12f5ac8cbadefc15701e873ccdabc3b07ea5a6.png)
# A Ripples of the Past addon that adds Killer Queen
A Minecraft mod that adds a no canon accurate Killer Queen to Ripples of the Past mod ([https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/versions)) obtainable through Stand Arrow

## Attacks
- Normal Punch (shift variation: Heavy Attack)
- Punch Rush (shift variation: Heavy Attack)
- Sheer Heart Attack
- Stray Snow ball: launches a snow bomb that explodes when it collides
## Abilities
- First Bomb Entities: turns one entity into a bomb
- First Bomb Items: turns ome item in the offhand into a bomb
